# cancelEditing()

**Instance Method**

Ends the editing session and discards any changes that were made to the event.

## Declaration

```swift
func cancelEditing()
```

## Discussion

This method is the programmatic equivalent of the user tapping Cancel. The delegate won’t receive the [doc://com.apple.eventkitui/documentation/EventKitUI/EKEventEditViewDelegate/eventEditViewController(_:didCompleteWith:)] message, so you must dismiss the controller after calling this method.
title: cancelEditing()
